pokemon:jynx.name: Jynx
pokemon:jynx.summary: Jynx walks rhythmically, swaying and shaking its hips as if it were dancing. Its motions are so bouncingly alluring, people seeing it are compelled to shake their hips without giving any thought to what they are doing.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Jynx walks rhythmically, swaying and shaking its hips as if it were dancing. Its motions are so bouncingly alluring, people seeing it are compelled to shake their hips without giving any thought to what they are doing.
Its cries sound like human speech. However, it is impossible to tell what it is trying to say.
Its cries sound like human speech. However, it is impossible to tell what it is trying to say.
It seductively wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.
It has several different cry pat­ terns, each of which seems to have its own meaning.
Its cries sound like human speech. However, it is impossible to tell what it is trying to say.
A JYNX sashays rhythmically as if it were dancing. Its motions are so bouncingly alluring, people seeing it are compelled to shake their hips without noticing.
It speaks using a language that sounds human. Research is under way to determine what is being said.
It rocks its body rhythmically. It appears to alter the rhythm depend­ ing on how it is feeling.
It rocks its body rhythmically. It appears to alter the rhythm depending on how it is feeling.
It seductively wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.
Appears to move to a rhythm of its own, as if it were dancing. It wiggles its hips as it walks.
Appears to move to a rhythm of its own, as if it were dancing. It wiggles its hips as it walks.

Jynx walks rhythmically, swaying and shaking its hips as if it were dancing. Its motions are so bouncingly alluring, people seeing it are compelled to shake their hips without giving any thought to what they are doing.
Its cries sound like human speech. However, it is impossible to tell what it is trying to say.
Its cries sound like human speech. However, it is impossible to tell what it is trying to say.
It seductively wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.

JYNX walks rhythmically, swaying and shaking its hips as if it were dancing. Its motions are so bouncingly alluring, people seeing it are compelled to shake their hips without giving any thought to what they are doing.

JYNX walks rhythmically, swaying and shaking its hips as if it were dancing. Its motions are so bouncingly alluring, people seeing it are compelled to shake their hips without giving any thought to what they are doing.
The Jynx of Galar often have beautiful and delicate voices. Some of these Pokémon have even gathered a fan base.
It speaks a lan­ guage similar to that of humans. However, it seems to use dancing to communicate.
It speaks a language similar to that of humans. However, it seems to use dancing to communicate.
In certain parts of Galar, Jynx was once feared and worshiped as the Queen of Ice.
Its strange cries sound like human language. There are some musicians who compose songs for Jynx to sing.
It sways its hips to a rhythm all its own. The precise movements of Jynx living in Alola are truly wonderful.
Its cries sound like human speech. However, it is impossible to tell what it is trying to say.
Its cries sound like human speech. However, it is impossible to tell what it is trying to say.
It wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.
It speaks using a language that sounds human. Research is under way to determine what is being said.
Appears to move to a rhythm of its own, as if it were dancing. It wiggles its hips as it walks.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Jynx walks rhythmically, swaying and shaking its hips as if it were dancing. Its motions are so bouncingly alluring, people seeing it are compelled to shake their hips without giving any thought to what they are doing.

pokemon:smoochum.name: Smoochum
pokemon:smoochum.summary: Smoochum actively runs about, but also falls quite often. Whenever the chance arrives, it will look for its reflection to make sure its face hasn’t become dirty.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Smoochum actively runs about, but also falls quite often. Whenever the chance arrives, it will look for its reflection to make sure its face hasn’t become dirty.
It tests everything by touching with its lips, which remember what it likes and dislikes.
It tests everything by touching with its lips, which remember what it likes and dislikes.
The sensitivity of its lips develops most quickly. It uses them to try to identify unknown objects.
It tests everything by touching with its lips, which remember what it likes and dislikes.
It actively runs about, but also falls often. Whenever it falls, it will check its reflection on a lake’s surface to make sure its face hasn’t become dirty.
It always rocks its head slowly backwards and forwards as if it is trying to kiss someone.
Its lips are the most sensitive parts on its body. It always uses its lips first to examine things.
Its lips are the most sensitive part of its body. It always uses its lips first to examine things.
Its lips are the most sensitive parts on its body. It always uses its lips first to examine things.
Smoochum actively runs about, but also falls quite often. Whenever the chance arrives, it will look for its reflection to make sure its face hasn’t become dirty.
It tests everything by touching with its lips, which remember what it likes and dislikes.
It tests everything by touching with its lips, which remember what it likes and dislikes.
SMOOCHUM actively runs about, but also falls quite often. Whenever the chance arrives, it will look for its reflection to make sure its face hasn’t become dirty.
SMOOCHUM actively runs about, but also falls quite often. Whenever the chance arrives, it will look for its reflection to make sure its face hasn’t become dirty.
This is a very curious Pokémon. Smoochum decides what it likes and dislikes by touching things with its lips.
It always rocks its head slowly backwards and for­ wards as if it is trying to kiss someone.
It always rocks its head slowly backwards and forwards as if it is trying to kiss someone.
If its face gets even slightly dirty, Smoochum will bathe immediately. But if its body gets dirty, Smoochum doesn’t really seem to care.
Highly perceptive sensors, Smoochum’s lips are kept moist by its daily application of tree sap.
When it examines things, before touching them with its hands, it makes lip contact and then diligently licks all the dirt off its lips.
It tests everything by touching with its lips, which remember what it likes and dislikes.
It tests everything by touching with its lips, which remember what it likes and dislikes.
Its lips are the most sensitive part of its body. It always uses its lips first to examine things.
It tests everything by touching with its lips, which remember what it likes and dislikes.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Smoochum actively runs about, but also falls quite often. Whenever the chance arrives, it will look for its reflection to make sure its face hasn’t become dirty.
